header.owner_warning_title: No CC is currently attached to this board. Posts will not arrive until CC takes ownership via attach_to_board or similar.
header.unread_count_title: Mark all {{count}} unread items as read
header.unread_confirm: Mark all {{count}} unread items as read?
header.mark_all_read_failed: Failed to mark all as read

session_dashboard.session_name_save_failed: Failed to save the session name
session_dashboard.no_boards_help: No boards in this session yet. They'll appear here once Claude Code calls create_board.

concern_card.resize_handle_title: Drag to resize, double-click to reset

item_card.mark_read_node_title: Mark unread items in this node as read
item_card.input_placeholder: Enter your reply (⌘/Ctrl+Enter to send, paste/drop for images)
item_card.input_placeholder_default: Type a message (⌘/Ctrl+Enter to send, paste/drop for images)
item_card.input_disabled: CC is not attached — cannot post

anchor.empty: No bookmarks yet. Use the leaf icon at the top-right of any message to bookmark it.
anchor.unanchor_confirm_message: Removes the bookmark only — the original message stays in its thread.

settings.title: Settings
settings.auto_read_help: When ON, unread CC messages are automatically marked as read once a node card stays visible on screen for 5 seconds. When OFF, each card shows a Mark-Read button so you can mark messages explicitly.
settings.language_help: Choose UI language. "System" follows your browser preference.
settings.theme_help: UI color scheme. "System" follows your OS preference (and updates automatically when you toggle it).
settings.power_help: Holds an OS-level wake-lock so this machine ({{platform}}) doesn't go to sleep while discussion-tree is in use. macOS uses caffeinate, Linux uses systemd-inhibit, Windows uses a PowerShell wake-loop (best-effort).
settings.footer: Settings are stored in this device's localStorage (per device).

structure_request.trigger_title: Ask Claude to add or edit concerns and items on this board
structure_request.title: Request a board structure change
structure_request.description: Describe in plain text how you'd like Claude to add, edit, or reorganize the concerns and items on this board. Claude will interpret it, apply the changes, and post a summary.
structure_request.placeholder: e.g. "Add a 'Risk assessment' concern at the end, with two items: 'business continuity risk' and 'technical risk'"

errors.default_board_locked: Default conversation board has a fixed structure and cannot be modified
errors.update_nothing: Nothing to update — pass title / context / kind
errors.no_recipient: Recipient (Claude Code) is not attached or not responding. The text is preserved — please retry.
errors.delivery_timeout: No response from the recipient. The text is preserved — please retry.

default_board.title: Conversation
default_board.welcome_message: Posts here are delivered as direct messages to Claude Code.

map.badge_title: Divergent-discussion map (the divergence phase before a board)
map.general_chat_note: Messages here reach Claude, who maintains the map. Claude responds either with a reply in this chat or by updating the map (adding / linking / editing nodes).
map.chat_placeholder: Message about the whole map… (Enter for newline / ⌘Enter to send)
map.input_disabled: CC is not attached — cannot post
